title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.723 - Research feasibility studies to be carried out by regional centers
text:
192.723.  Research feasibility studies to be carried out by regional centers. — Beginning upon receipt of appropriations for that purpose and subject to the availability of appropriations, but not before July 1, 1985, innovative research feasibility studies which cannot be funded by traditional mechanisms and which have significance for having impact on the state arthritis problem may be carried out by arthritis centers established pursuant to section 192.714.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1028 § 11)
